import re, unicodedata, json

AR_DIACRITICS = re.compile(r'[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u06D6-\u06DC\u06DF-\u06E8\u06EA-\u06ED]')
TATWEEL = '\u0640'

def normalize_ar(s):
    if s is None:
        return ''
    # remove tatweel
    s = s.replace(TATWEEL, '')
    # unify Arabic letters
    # convert different hamza/aleph forms to bare alef
    s = re.sub('[\u0622\u0623\u0625\u0671]', '\u0627', s)  # آ،أ،إ،ٱ -> ا
    # ya and alif maqsura
    s = s.replace('\u0649', '\u064A')  # ى -> ي
    # ta marbuta to ha? often not needed
    # s = s.replace('\u0629', '\u0647')
    # remove diacritics
    s = AR_DIACRITICS.sub('', s)
    # remove punctuation and non-letters/digits/space
    s = re.sub(r'[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]', ' ', s)
    # collapse spaces
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s).strip()
    return s

def tokenize(s):
    return normalize_ar(s).split()

norm_full_span = "لا تَزالُ الإِنسانُ يُحِبُّ أَن يَكُونَ عَزَizaً وَيُكْرَهُ أَن يَكُونَ ضَعيفاً"
norm_full_span_norm = normalize_ar(norm_full_span)
norm_full_span_norm

def normalize_ar_strict(s):
    s = normalize_ar(s)
    # remove ASCII letters
    s = re.sub(r'[A-Za-z]', '', s)
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s).strip()
    return s

norm_full_span_norm_strict = normalize_ar_strict(norm_full_span)
norm_full_span_norm_strict

# Let's compute closest hadith by token-level F1 based on tokens that are not stopwords
candidate_scores=[]
span_tokens=set(um.split())
# remove stopwords set of Arabic basic
stop=set(['لا','ان','ان','ان','في','من','على','الى','فيه','فان','ما','هو','هذا','ذلك','ثم','و','او','عن','اذا'])
span_tokens_nw=[t for t in um.split() if t not in stop]
len(span_tokens_nw), span_tokens_nw

def token_set_score(text):
    t = normalize_ar_strict(text).split()
    t = [x for x in t if x not in stop]
    s = set(t)
    inter=len(set(span_tokens_nw) & s)
    precision = inter/len(set(s)) if s else 0.0
    recall = inter/len(set(span_tokens_nw)) if span_tokens_nw else 0.0
    f1 = (2*precision*recall/(precision+recall)) if (precision+recall)>0 else 0.0
    return f1, inter, s

best=[]
for i,h in enumerate(hadith):
    text = h.get('Matn') if h.get('Matn') else h.get('hadithTxt') or ''
    f1, inter, s= token_set_score(text)
    if f1>0:
        best.append((f1,i,text[:200]))
len(best), sorted(best, reverse=True)[:10]

def word_in(norm_text, word):
    # consider as separate token
    tokens = norm_text.split()
    return word in tokens

res=[]
for i,h in enumerate(hadith):
    text = h.get('Matn') if h.get('Matn') else h.get('hadithTxt') or ''
    n = normalize_ar_strict(text)
    if word_in(n, 'عزيز') and ('ضعيف' in n or word_in(n,'ضعيف')):
        res.append((i, hadith[i]['title'], text[:200], n[:200]))
res[:10], len(res)
